hooks.prompt: The session is ending. Check if meaningful work was done (decisions, patterns, bugs fixed, approaches corrected). If yes, run the compound protocol: scan for learnings, write entries via commit_memory, update PROJECT_STATUS.md (or DIRECTION.md), call publish_result, and call sync_memory. If the session was trivial, just call publish_result with a brief summary. Context: $ARGUMENTS

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d=process.env.AI_DIR||p.join(process.cwd(),'.ai');if(!fs.existsSync(d))process.exit(0);try{const{execFileSync}=require('child_process');const s=execFileSync('git',['diff','--name-only'],{cwd:p.resolve(d,'..'),encoding:'utf-8'});if(s.includes('.ai/')){console.log(JSON.stringify({additionalContext:'Sub-agent made .ai/ changes. Consider running sync_memory to persist them.'}))}}catch{}"
